parameters.content:
## Weekly Reconciliation — Sunday 6pm NZT

Background process that keeps the current-truth layer honest without Zane doing anything.
Reads the week's memories + current_state + decisions due, asks Claude to reconcile, and pushes a digest to Telegram + logs a 'weekly_reconciliation' memory.

PROPOSE-ONLY by design: it surfaces current_state updates for Zane (or a Claude session) to apply via update_current_state — it does NOT auto-rewrite the truth layer.

SETUP (one-time):
1. Attach the 'Command Centre Bot' Telegram credential + set the real chat id on 'Send Reconciliation Digest'.
2. In 'Format Digest', replace REPLACE_WITH_CHECKIN_TOKEN with the real CHECKIN_TOKEN.
3. Confirm the Supabase + Anthropic credentials resolved on import.
4. Activate when happy — created inactive so it never fires before review.

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ title: 'Weekly reconciliation — ' + $json.week_ending_nz, transcript: $json.memory_text, summary: ($json.memory_text || '').slice(0, 500), source: 'weekly_reconciliation', status: 'completed' }) }}
